items.title: OpenAI's Sam Altman apologizes for not reporting ChatGPT account of Tumbler Ridge suspect to police
items.summary: Two months following the deadly shooting in Tumbler Ridge, British Columbia, OpenAI's Sam Altman has formally apologized for not informing police of the alarming ChatGPT convers...
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Anthropic created a test marketplace for agent-on-agent commerce
items.summary: In a recent experiment, Anthropic created a classified marketplace where AI agents represented both buyers and sellers, striking real deals for real goods and real money.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Altman apologises after OpenAI failed to alert police before Tumbler Ridge killings
items.summary: “I am deeply sorry that we did not alert law enforcement to the account that was banned in June,” Mr. Altman said
